name: Boston Baked Beans for 3 1/2 Qt. Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. In the morning, parboil them for 10 minutes with a teaspoon of baking soda added to the water. Drain well.
3. Rinse beans with cold water and drain again.
4. Place onion in the bottom of the crockpot.
5. Add beans and ham bone on top of the onion.
6. Mix remaining ingredients (brown sugar, molasses, dry mustard, salt, pepper) with hot water to create a liquid that sits 1 inch below the beans. Pour over the beans and cover.
7. Cook on high for 4 hours and remove the ham bone.
8. Remove ham pieces and dice them, returning them to the pot. (They will measure about 1-1.5 cups of meat).
9. Cook for an additional 3-4 hours on low heat. Avoid excessive stirring during cooking to prevent the beans from becoming too sticky.
